query:
query GetDoc($id: ID!, $password: String) {
  doc(id: $id, password: $password) {
    id
    title
    titleEdited
    previewUrl
    archived
    disabled
    createdTime
    updatedTime
    editedTime
    savedTime
    currentSnapshotId
    publishedSnapshotId
    publishedSnapshot {
      content
      __typename
    }
    publishedTime
    source
    comments {
      ...CommentFields
      __typename
    }
    reactions {
      ...ReactionFields
      __typename
    }
    accessLinks {
      id
      docId
      type
      permission
      token
      url
      __typename
    }
    links {
      url
      status
      __typename
    }
    orgAccess
    organization {
      id
      name
      products
      __typename
    }
    theme {
      ...DefaultThemeFields
      fonts {
        id
        name
        url
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    collaborators {
      ...DocCollaboratorFields
      __typename
    }
    invitations {
      ...DocInvitationsFields
      __typename
    }
    docUser {
      id
      docId
      lastViewed
      lastEdited
      favorited
      __typename
    }
    editors {
      ...DocEditorsFields
      __typename
    }
    createdBy {
      firstName
      displayName
      id
      email
      __typename
    }
    channels {
      ...DocChannelFields
      __typename
    }
    site {
      ...DocSiteFields
      __typename
    }
    file {
      ...FileFields
      __typename
    }
    docGenerateInput {
      id
      settings
      docGeneration {
        id
        generationType
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
}

fragment CommentFields on Comment {
  id
  docId
  cardId
  content
  targetText
  targetHtml
  createdTime
  updatedTime
  archived
  targetId
  status
  user {
    ...CommentAuthorFields
    __typename
  }
  replies {
    ...ReplyFields
    __typename
  }
  reactions {
    ...ReactionFields
    __typename
  }
  __typename
}

fragment CommentAuthorFields on User {
  id
  displayName
  profileImageUrl
  email
  __typename
}

fragment ReplyFields on Comment {
  id
  commentId
  content
  createdTime
  updatedTime
  archived
  user {
    ...CommentAuthorFields
    __typename
  }
  reactions {
    ...ReactionFields
    __typename
  }
  __typename
}

fragment ReactionFields on Reaction {
  emoji
  count
  targetId
  targetType
  docId
  users {
    id
    displayName
    profileImageUrl
    __typename
  }
  __typename
}

fragment DefaultThemeFields on Theme {
  id
  workspaceId
  name
  headingFont
  headingFontWeight
  bodyFont
  bodyFontWeight
  accentColor
  logoUrl
  config
  priority
  previewUrl
  archived
  createdTime
  updatedTime
  fonts {
    ... on ThemeFont {
      ...DefaultThemeFontFields
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  __typename
}

fragment DefaultThemeFontFields on ThemeFont {
  id
  name
  url
  __typename
}

fragment DocCollaboratorFields on DocCollaborator {
  docId
  user {
    id
    displayName
    email
    profileImageUrl
    __typename
  }
  permission
  guest
  accessLinkId
  __typename
}

fragment DocInvitationsFields on DocInvitation {
  id
  docId
  email
  permission
  __typename
}

fragment DocEditorsFields on DocEditor {
  user {
    id
    displayName
    email
    profileImageUrl
    __typename
  }
  lastEdited
  __typename
}

fragment DocChannelFields on DocChannel {
  id
  name
  slug
  permission
  __typename
}

fragment DocSiteFields on Site {
  id
  archived
  workspaceId
  name
  domains {
    id
    siteId
    name
    status
    builtin
    canonical
    __typename
  }
  hasCustomDomain
  routes {
    id
    siteId
    docId
    path
    offline
    doc {
      id
      title
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  currentDeployment {
    id
    siteId
    buildHost
    deploymentTime
    __typename
  }
  createdTime
  updatedTime
  previewUrl
  pageCount
  archived
  enabled
  faviconUrl
  themeId
  navEnabled
  navContent
  gtmContainerId
  metaPixelId
  __typename
}

fragment FileFields on File {
  id
  title
  titleEdited
  archived
  disabled
  theme {
    ...DefaultThemeFields
    __typename
  }
  sourceTheme {
    ...DefaultThemeFields
    __typename
  }
  channels {
    id
    name
    permission
    slug
    __typename
  }
  createdBy {
    id
    displayName
    email
    __typename
  }
  accessLinks {
    ...AccessLinkFields
    __typename
  }
  collaborators {
    ...FileCollaboratorFields
    __typename
  }
  invitations {
    ...FileInvitationsFields
    __typename
  }
  fileUser {
    id
    fileId
    lastViewed
    lastEdited
    favorited
    editCount
    __typename
  }
  site {
    id
    enabled
    __typename
  }
  createdTime
  updatedTime
  editedTime
  publishedTime
  savedTime
  mainPageId
  workspace {
    id
    name
    products
    gammaDataProcessingRole
    __typename
  }
  workspaceAccess
  pages {
    ...PageFields
    __typename
  }
  searchEngineIndexingEnabled
  isTemplate
  __typename
}

fragment AccessLinkFields on AccessLink {
  id
  docId
  fileId
  type
  permission
  token
  url
  __typename
}

fragment FileCollaboratorFields on FileCollaborator {
  user {
    id
    displayName
    email
    profileImageUrl
    __typename
  }
  fileId
  permission
  guest
  accessLinkId
  __typename
}

fragment FileInvitationsFields on FileInvitation {
  id
  fileId
  email
  permission
  __typename
}

fragment PageFields on Page {
  id
  title
  description
  archived
  path
  offline
  createdTime
  updatedTime
  editedTime
  titleEdited
  pathEdited
  previewUrl
  pageOrder
  __typename
}
